engine_label: Selenium headless Chrome (requests first, then browser if thin/error)
markdown:
[Timeline](index.html)

## Timeline 14th F1TENTH Autonomous Grand Prix

##### Timeline is subject to change. Please follow announcements in our slack channel for the latest updates.

DATE | IN-PERSON COMPETITION  
---|---  
June 14th |  [Registration Opens](https://forms.gle/1o5BYoRSWh1MtbSy5)  
Aug 18th   
10 am EDT | Orientation 1 (Online Meeting)   
[Meeting Recording ](https://drive.google.com/file/d/10EVy9yqg2SSA-zs2HKXWD88WU-HgUl5w/view?usp=sharing)   
Demonstrate expectations, prospective participants can ask questions  
[Meeting Slides](https://docs.google.com/presentation/d/10jcAWR64iQhtSIJIH2qQv4T0rDpPqSHLgNWOFFO9zb4/edit?usp=sharing)  
Sep 8th   
10 m EDT | Orientation 2 (Online Meeting)   
[Meeting Recording ](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1934BNM2QItRUvgmMxXkavVzCzuAniONi/view?usp=drive_link)   
Competition Rules overview, Track overview for in-person competition  
[Meeting Slides](https://docs.google.com/presentation/d/10jcAWR64iQhtSIJIH2qQv4T0rDpPqSHLgNWOFFO9zb4/edit?usp=sharing)  
Sep 22nd | Registration closes  
Video Submission: Demonstrate Driving with F1TENTH car  
Oct 1st | Track Setup  
Oct 2nd | Teams Training  
All Teams can use the racetrack the whole day  
Oct 3rd |  Qualification Session  
Oct 4th | Race day  
Award Ceremony
